raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> while in XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX credit card was overcharged in a souvenir shop. My husband and I were charged {$240.00} for a simple cotton t-shirt. This was NOT the price we agreed on. Upon paying we were scammed and charged in pesos a total of {$4700.00}, however we did not SIGN for that transaction. The vendor took our card and inserted the chip but never showed us the total or gave us a receipt to sign. We were given a very minimal receipt that didnt explain the purchase. See attachment below. It wasnt until the purchase posted on our credit card that we realized how badly we were scammed. We tried to return to the vendor and could not find him. I have tried to settle with CitiBank but they are not abiding by protecting the customer and let the charge go through making me responsible for FRAUD.
